name: Acronis Cyber Protect Cloud
description: Monitor backup activities, protection policies, alerts, and tenant usage for cyber protection compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Acronis Management Portal as an administrator
2. Navigate to Settings > API Clients
3. Create a new API client with the required scopes
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Note your Datacenter URL (e.g., https://us-cloud.acronis.com or https://eu-cloud.acronis.com)
6. Find your Tenant ID in the portal under Company > Overview
7. Enter all values below

credentialFields.label: Datacenter URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Acronis datacenter URL (e.g., https://us-cloud.acronis.com, https://eu-cloud.acronis.com)

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: API client ID from Acronis management console

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: API client secret from Acronis management console

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Checks for active backup and security alerts that require attention

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Verifies that backup protection policies are properly configured and active

checks.name: Backup logs
checks.description: Reviews recent backup activities and tasks for successful completion

checks.name: Systems Description
checks.description: Monitors tenant usage and resource consumption for backup services
